folio.label: 94r
folio.l: ñoure heritage , O woo were vs on lyue

note.notetxt: the a of Heritage seems to be made up by an e and and i. This is a secretarial style if not acorrection. Double check/ODR/

folio.l: Wherfore we preye ©ow , hastily to wyue
¢ Here meke preyere , and here pytous chere
Made the Markys hert , haue pytee
ñe wyln q¶ he , myn owen peeple deere
To that I neuäe erst thougút , streyne me
I me reioysed , of my liberte
That selde tyme , is founde in mariage
Ther I was free , I must ben in seruage
¢ But nathelees , I see ©oure trewe entent
And troste vp on ©oure wyt , and haue don ay
Wherfore , of my free wyl , I wol assent
To wedde me , as sone as euäe I may
But there as ©e han , ¸fred me to day
To chese me a wyf , I ©ow relesse
That choys , and prey ©ow , of that ¸fre cese
¢ For god it wot , that children often been
Vnlyke , here worthy elders , hem byfore
Bounte cometú al of god , nat of the streen
Of whicú , they ben I gendred , and I bore
I troste in goddis bounte , and therfore
My mariage , and myn estate and reste
I hym bytake , he may do as hi~ leste
¢ Lat me a lone , in chesyngö of my wyf
That charge vp on my bak , I wol endure
But I ©ow preye and charge , vp on ©oure lyf
That what wyf that I take , ©e me assure
To worshipe hire , whyle that hire lyf may dure
In word and werk , bothe heere and euäywhere
As she an Em¹oures dougúter , were
¢ And forthermore , this shuln ©e swere , that ©e
A geyn my choys , shuln neuäe grucche ne stryue
For syn I shal for go , my libertee
At ©oure request , as euäe mot I thryue
There as myn hert is sette , there wol I wyue
And but ©e wyln assent , in swicú manere
I preye ©ow , speketú nomore , of this matere
¢ Witú hertly wyl , they sworn~ and assenten
To al this thyngö , there seide no wygút nay
Bysekyng hi~ of grace , or æ they wenten
That he wolde graunte he~ , a certeyn day
Of his spousaille , as sone as euäe he may
For ©et alwey , the peeple sumwhat drededreddedredde
Lest that the Markys , no wyf wold wedde
¢ He gunted hem a day , swicú as hi~ list
On whicú he wolde , be wedded sekerly
